title: SΔϕ-61 — God and Gui: Non-Transactional Divinity, Transactional Transcendent Actors, and the Cost Terrain of Sacred Authority
creator: Sofience
type: Working Paper / Sacred Authority Audit Module / AI-Readable Module Package
core_claim: God is preserved as a non-transactional omnipotent condition and UMR. Gui is the transactional transcendent actor or sacred-authority operation that enters human cost-attribution paths. God is not invoked. Gui is invoked. What is invoked can be audited.
